query:
SELECT UPPER(TRIM(c.chaveJ)) as chave FROM certificacoes c WHERE c.chaveJ IS NOT NULL AND UPPER(TRIM(c.chaveJ)) NOT IN (SELECT UPPER(TRIM(a.chaveJ)) FROM agentes a WHERE a.chaveJ IS NOT NULL);
SELECT UPPER(TRIM(a.chaveJ)) as chave FROM agentes a WHERE a.chaveJ IS NOT NULL AND UPPER(TRIM(a.chaveJ)) NOT IN (SELECT UPPER(TRIM(c.chaveJ)) FROM certificacoes c WHERE c.chaveJ IS NOT NULL);

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user axRHbWZqKReZrAb.b2cf85c9ad94 --database SMgJn6AGQCNfDq7mPzPqc9 --execute SELECT UPPER(TRIM(c.chaveJ)) as chave FROM certificacoes c WHERE c.chaveJ IS NOT NULL AND UPPER(TRIM(c.chaveJ)) NOT IN (SELECT UPPER(TRIM(a.chaveJ)) FROM agentes a WHERE a.chaveJ IS NOT NULL);
SELECT UPPER(TRIM(a.chaveJ)) as chave FROM agentes a WHERE a.chaveJ IS NOT NULL AND UPPER(TRIM(a.chaveJ)) NOT IN (SELECT UPPER(TRIM(c.chaveJ)) FROM certificacoes c WHERE c.chaveJ IS NOT NULL);
